upcoming.name: Project Microchip
upcoming.summary: A social deduction survival game set in a radiation-filled, abandoned forest. Survivors must complete tasks to stay alive, while the Infected hunt them down.

upcoming.name: Smile Town
upcoming.summary: Pay off your debts by working part-time in the nightlife district of Smile Town! Buy items from your friend Apple Ginger's shop to get an advantage at your part-time job.

upcoming.name: Backrooms: The Twisted One
upcoming.summary: Backrooms: The Twisted One is a tense horror escape experience set in the classic yellow liminal halls of the Backrooms. Explore 3 levels across Normal and Hard difficulties while haunted doll entities stalk your every move. They freeze when watched, but the moment you look away, they close in. Search the maze for coll

upcoming.name: Where the Forest Ends
upcoming.summary: Where the forest end is a story-driven, top-down horror shooter set in a zombie-infested post-apocalypse. Visceral, grounded, and realistic. A fresh take on a classic genre.

upcoming.name: Reincarnated as a Dark Lord Before Taking Over the World with Power 999999999
upcoming.summary: An idle RPG where you play as a dark lord with the power to reincarnate. Choose different paths with each life to grow progressively stronger, eventually gaining enough power to conquer the world.

upcoming.name: Chicken TD: Defenders of the Coop
upcoming.summary: Chicken TD is a unique tower defense game where you strategically summon and upgrade creature towers to defend your coop from waves of enemies, while also engaging in Souls-like melee combat with a chosen weapon to directly hold the line and collect meta-progression currency.

upcoming.name: Deer & Boy
upcoming.summary: A Cinematic Platformer who you follow the journey of a boy who, during his flight will meet an unexpected companion. Together they will overcome many obstacles that will change their lives forever.

upcoming.name: A Simple Square
upcoming.summary: A simple square is a puzzle game with many interacting mechanics, which you will discover throughout your adventure in a large amount of diversified levels.

upcoming.name: Golel
upcoming.summary: Golel, a first person roguelike Dungeon Crawler.Combat is focused on mobility and using the environment to your advantage.Dropping book shelves on an enemy, or kicking an enemy into a trap are all valid tactics.Deep skill/magic and combat gameplay, with many development paths.

upcoming.name: Momento
upcoming.summary: Journey through a life where the objects you choose to keep influence the life you lead. A cozy room decorator with whimsical settings; relaxing gameplay; and charming branching narratives, Momento will be a warm ode to the challenge of following your dreams down the winding road of life.

upcoming.name: BrokenLore: Follow
upcoming.summary: BrokenLore: Follow is a captivating psychological first-person horror game that immerses players in the haunting narrative of Anne, as she grapples with issues of self-acceptance, bullying, and worthlessness while encountering metaphorical surreal creatures that heighten the terror of her journey.

upcoming.name: Rancher: A New Life
upcoming.summary: Start a new life as a Rancher. Travel the forest paths by quad bike, raise cattle, build, repair, and improve your farm. Take care of animals, go fishing, cook, grow vegetables, practice your accuracy on shooting range, take photos, and much more. Relax away from the hustle and bustle of the city!

upcoming.name: Damashi Game
upcoming.summary: A thrilling multiplayer experience where social deception, strategy, and quick thinking are your greatest weapons. Outsmart your opponents and be the last player standing in this intense fight for survival.

upcoming.name: Muri: Wildwoods
upcoming.summary: Explore the mysterious creature-filled Wildwoods as a Muri. Find secrets, solve puzzles, befriend creatures, and clean away the corruption. Restore the world's beauty in this cozy adventure!

upcoming.name: Sister Ray
upcoming.summary: 2D RPG about the brutal daily life of a drug addicted artist called Ray, who takes care of her little sister. Look after your condition, so no one finds out about the addiction. Improve your drawing and social skills. Do everything to get cash for another fix. Survive and look for a way out.

upcoming.name: Archwizard
upcoming.summary: Fast paced "Hyper Shooter" complemented with esoteric exploration experience. Take a quest to become Arch Wizard: dominate surrounding realms, reverse Time, escape Death, befriend Chaos, face the End of the World. Knowledge based progression. High scores. Full of secrets.

upcoming.name: Gretel's Honesty
upcoming.summary: A comic-like visual novel, expressing a new story based on the fairy tale “Hansel and Gretel”.

upcoming.name: Void Martyrs
upcoming.summary: A grimdark survival horror about a nun in a space suit. Scavenge amongst drifting space cathedrals, balance your faith with survival, and craft the tools of your salvation.

upcoming.name: Schizophrenia: R.E.M. Protocol
upcoming.summary: Schizophrenia is a game where you have to not go crazy and get out of the bunker. Use all the items you can find to survive. Remember. The main thing is not to go crazy. And further. Don't make loud noises. They can hear you.

upcoming.name: Don't Let It Starve
upcoming.summary: A horror roguelike deckbuilder. You're trapped in a kitchen, forced to feed a half-chef monster that crawls through the vents. Don't let it starve.

upcoming.name: Until the End
upcoming.summary: Love remembers you. Even if you’ve forgotten.

upcoming.name: A Simple Life with My Unobtrusive Sister
upcoming.summary: A fully animated and voiced sister life-sim with roguelite runs. Find a cure for Mio’s illness. Share meals and quiet nights at home, then enter the Abyss each day to fight, loot, and push deeper to protect your simple life together.

upcoming.name: Freefall '95
upcoming.summary: Fast paced, arcade-like, 90’s inspired action packed fun! Play as a passenger on board a doomed flight stuck in a twisted time loop in the year 1995. Explore a wild time-bending narrative while stacking up trick combos, collecting items, earning coins, upgrading abilities and dodging debris!

upcoming.name: Orbital
upcoming.summary: Orbital is an outer space, endless survival, arcade game where players become planetary pilots to prolong the inevitable grasp of a super massive blackhole, witnessing the collapse of the solar system. Navigate the cosmic perils and chaos, deploying specialised planetary tech to endure the onslaught and ascend the gala

upcoming.name: Lirai: Heir Of Darkness
upcoming.summary:
Lirai: Heir of Darkness is a fast-paced action RPG set in a dark fantasy world consumed by an ancient curse. Players take on the role of Brian, a warrior who must uncover the truth behind their corrupted heritage before losing their humanity entirely.

The game features intense real-time combat with a fluid combo syste

upcoming.name: Chef Knight
upcoming.summary: Cook what you kill in this cozy fantasy incremental. Slay monsters, turn them into delicious meals, and build your dungeon food business!

upcoming.name: Hold Your King
upcoming.summary: In this physics-based co-op platformer, you and a friend must carry your short-tempered king through deadly medieval courses. Dodge traps, maintain balance, and work together to reach the throne room. One wrong step, and the king might crown you with his rage!

upcoming.name: Wheel Balance
upcoming.summary: Wheel Balance is a hard and fun physics-based game about balancing on two wheels. Master controls and beat all locations, compete with your friends. Try not to fall far away down!

upcoming.name: Chrysalis: Chrome Butterfly
upcoming.summary: Chrysalis: Chrome Butterfly - a cyberpunk neo-noir thriller. Play as Wendy, an agent with memory gaps investigating a disappearance in Neo-Kyoto. Switch between choreographed combat and detective work to uncover a conspiracy where reality is an illusion. But is the truth worth knowing?

upcoming.name: Grinnel
upcoming.summary: If you stop, your light will go out, if you turn around, your path will be erased. GRINNEL is a living maze that tracks your movements and glances. Don't look back because the darkness is waiting for you there.

upcoming.name: Murderous Sunlight
upcoming.summary: In a dark world where Holy mages rewrite probability and Profane forces trap the dead in eternal patterns, Murderous Sunlight blends exploration, psychological depth, and occasional combat in an unsettling journey. Unravel a linear, character-driven story about trauma, identity, and defiance.

upcoming.name: Beam It Up!
upcoming.summary: Capture monsters from distant planets and add them to your cosmic collection. Upgrade your ship, travel further, and become the galaxy’s top collector.

upcoming.name: Shape World Level up Lite
upcoming.summary: A hyper clicker that combines control and strategy! From casual play to extreme difficulty, anyone can take on the challenge. Experience a vast adventure and endless leveling created by a solo developer!

upcoming.name: Whiskers Tale
upcoming.summary: A cozy cat adventure set in a charming city. Explore rooftops, chase pigeons, help townsfolk, and uncover heartfelt stories at your own pace.

upcoming.name: Fragile Frontier
upcoming.summary: You're an owl postal worker who just brought the first automobile to Moonperch Island. Drive with packages stacked on your roof, hit a bump, watch them scatter! Triple-jump to glide, help friends recover cargo, upgrade your truck. 1-4 player co-op. But why is the mountain getting warmer...?

upcoming.name: PawlleyBall
upcoming.summary: PawlleyBall is a cute volleyball game where cats face off in quick 1v1 matches. Jump, dive, and spike to score against opponents on colorful, stylized courts. Simple controls and lively rallies make it fun to pick up and replay.

upcoming.name: Focus Grove
upcoming.summary: Build your cozy forest farm… while thriving in life. Focus Grove is a mindful game that improves your focus, well-being and work-life balance. Let your Woodlings grow your farm, while you grow in life.

upcoming.name: Celestial Lumina
upcoming.summary: Ascend from the depths as Evan, heir of a fallen underworld, to uncover the truth behind a world stripped of dawn. Celestial Lumina is a 2D Pixel-Art Metroidvania where Light clashes with the Darkness that stole the sky.

upcoming.name: Space Empires 4X
upcoming.summary: A faithful digital adaptation of the acclaimed board game by GMT Games, beloved by wargamers for almost two decades. Command the rise of your civilization and the fall of others, all in one to two hours.

upcoming.name: Kal
upcoming.summary: KAL is a first-person psychological horror game. Trapped in an old, abandoned Creole house, immerse yourself in a time loop and relive the story of a slave who became a true legend.

upcoming.name: They Are Rising
upcoming.summary: They Are Rising is an RTS strategy game set against the backdrop of the apocalypse. Combine skills, build a massive army, establish shelters, and fight against large numbers of enemies. How long can you survive?

upcoming.name: Kurage no Gakkou
upcoming.summary: A teacher-in-training is sent to a middle school where all students are jellyfish, except for this one girl.

upcoming.name: Furniture Fu
upcoming.summary: Furniture Fu is a home-makeover, demon-hunting, hoard-fighting roguelike. Lay out furniture strategically to make awesome synergies and cosy houses - all in a day’s work for America’s first suburban ninja.

upcoming.name: What Happened At Sugar Hill?
upcoming.summary: A First Person Horror Walking Simulator set in a fictional town called Sugar Hill. Play as various characters trying to unravel the mystery of What Happened At Sugar Hill.

upcoming.name: Narcissist Tail
upcoming.summary:
A point and click horror with a bullet hell dodge combat system.

This game is about helping a wolf guy who gets annoyed at his loving family as you explore surreal environments.

upcoming.name: One Song, One Life
upcoming.summary: “One Song, One Life” is a rhythm adventure game where the music and story change based on the notes you hit. Take control of Sumire Kirishima, a girl striving to become the ultimate net artist and perform alongside her idol. Your performance will shape her destiny—one song, one life.

upcoming.name: Redstream Dispatch
upcoming.summary: Redstream Dispatch casts you as a police officer responding to multiple Dispatch Scenarios. Routine patrols spiral into a violent nightmare tied to a sinister streaming group. Randomized encounters and reactive gore make every run brutal. Rescue the girl. Get out alive.

upcoming.name: Between Sessions
upcoming.summary: An AI-driven narrative RPG that grows alongside your focus sessions. Set a real-life task, start a 25-minute Pomodoro, and return to a fresh chapter written while you worked. Choose a fantasy cooking journey or a sci-fi survival mystery. Free AI built in.

upcoming.name: Postponed
upcoming.summary: An addictive wave-based arcade roguelite, in which you are the manager of a game development studio. You get a project each week, that your team and you have to work on to get paid. With that money get upgrades, skill your employees and even unlock characters. Ever wanted to lead a game dev studio?

upcoming.name: The Door at the End of the Hall
upcoming.summary: Trapped in a looping hallway, you must study subtle changes to choose the right doors. Each passage resets the hall, but slightly wrong. Observe carefully, make smart choices, and uncover the path that unlocks the mysterious door at the end of the hall.

upcoming.name: Bug Drop
upcoming.summary: A top down action roguelite game with auto firing weapons, level up increasing diffrerent stats, equip up to six weapons and upgrade your build with hundreds of abilities. Fight against swarms of alien bug invaders including bosses.

upcoming.name: 3 Sheep Puzzle
upcoming.summary: 3 Sheep Puzzle is a 2D Sokoban-style logic game with remote movement. Guide the sheepdog through the barn to complete each level. A minimalist, relaxing challenge, perfect for quick minds looking to test their ingenuity.

upcoming.name: The Tenth Minute
upcoming.summary: The Tenth Minute is a short emotional visual novel about memory, regret, and the words people fail to say at the right moment. The game focuses on reading, character conversations, and quiet choices that affect how certain scenes unfold.

upcoming.name: Caliban
upcoming.summary: A strategic blackjack roguelike. Stack drinks, runes, and gems into game-breaking combos. Beat cursed bosses. Chase the leaderboard. One deck. One dealer. Infinite builds.

upcoming.name: Immunity Protocol
upcoming.summary: Pilot an immune-cell sentinel in a neon pixel-art horde-survival auto-shooter. Move manually, auto-fire evolving weapons, draft upgrades, equip symbiotes, and survive escalating pathogen swarms inside a collapsing biotech system.

upcoming.name: Shift Happens
upcoming.summary: Ever wanted to live out the American dream of working an abysmal 9–5 with rude management? No? Well too bad, I made a game about it anyway. Shift Happens is a first-person experience where you order stock, fill shelves, and keep the store running. The job is simple. Enjoy your shift.

upcoming.name: Ake no Yosuga: Twilight Loop
upcoming.summary:
This is a loop-based psychological horror visual novel.

Every day at 5 PM, a girl named Akane dies.
The protagonist, Keita, becomes aware of this loop and struggles to change her fate.
However, no matter what choices he makes, her death is inevitable.
As the story unfolds, a shocking truth emerges—
Akane has been dyin

upcoming.name: Honkai: Star Rail - The Lethe Below the Living
upcoming.summary:
Version 4.3 of Honkai: Star Rail, which includes:
• New characters: Mortenax Blade
• New Trailblaze Mission: "The Lethe Below the Living"
• New events
• ...and more!

upcoming.name: Warehouse 30
upcoming.summary: Take on your father's job as a warehouse clerk, inspect each shipment note carefully and direct them to where the corresponding warehouse. Stick to the rules, avoid making mistakes and subsequently fines to make enough money to help your family get through this rough patch.

upcoming.name: Ourlands
upcoming.summary: Ourlands is a cozy island builder where you handcraft and play around in bespoke little lands and truly explore your creativity. No goals, no management, just vibes.

upcoming.name: Irradiate 235
upcoming.summary: Discover and automate unique materials. Engineer the machines and tools for your factory. Handle hazardous materials to make explosives and near-limitless energy. Use your own tools to navigate a labyrinth of alien passages and uncover untouched tunnels in this innovative Automation-Metroidvania.

upcoming.name: Arcane Merchant
upcoming.summary: Open your own shop in the heart of a Medieval Fantasy realm! Stock your shelves with everything from potions and swords to mysterious crystals and legendary artifacts. Set your prices, earn your customers' trust and become the richest merchant in town!

upcoming.name: Rogue 'n' Roll: Dice of Fate
upcoming.summary:
Rogue 'n' Roll: Dice of Fate is a roguelite strategy game that blends dice-based combat with deckbuilding elements. Players roll and manage dice to trigger abilities, build powerful synergies through relics, and face increasingly challenging encounters.

Each run offers randomized events, enemies, and rewards, encourag

upcoming.name: I Am Better Than You
upcoming.summary: Prove you're better than the rest by popping balloons with household items! Control your helium-filled robot and make it clear who’s in charge. Wipe out your opponents and the friendship that binds you because only one can win.

upcoming.name: Unlucky Mummy
upcoming.summary: Unlucky Mummy is an incremental clicker where your task is to open a sarcophagus with a curse on it. Starting with a 25% chance of success, can you find 12 relics in a row to resurrect the mummy?

upcoming.name: Ward X
upcoming.summary: Ward X is a indie horror puzzle game set inside an abandoned hospital that should have stayed forgotten. Navigate twisted halls and solve puzzles as you search for a way out.

upcoming.name: Blood West: Scavengers
upcoming.summary: Endless West brings a long awaited endless randomizer mode to Blood West! See how long you can survive as you meet familiar friends and old foes in the never ending weird wild west!

upcoming.name: eFootball Kick-Off!
upcoming.summary: Experience the excitement of every goal – solo or with everyone! Begin your football journey with eFootball Kick-Off!

upcoming.name: Echoes of the Museum
upcoming.summary: "Echoes of the Museum" immerses you in a first-person psychological horror set inside a corrupted museum. You are Alicia, a restoration student drawn into a nightmare where collecting souls opens sealed paths, but slowly erodes your sanity and distorts reality.

upcoming.name: Neverness to Everness: Dreamwalk Corridor
upcoming.summary:
Version 1.1 of Neverness to Everness, which includes:
• New Characters: Lacrimosa and Chaos
• New Main Story Chapter
• New areas: Sunward Island and Corridor of Echoes
• New events and game modes
• ...and more!

upcoming.name: Calx
upcoming.summary: Calx is an atmospheric 3D action adventure inspired by visionary sci-fi art. Explore planet Syro - vast landscapes filled with crystal structures and ancient technology. Find out what the WARP did to the Quoths civilization. The environment guides you, revealing secrets through exploration.

upcoming.name: Snacktorio
upcoming.summary: Snacktorio is a factory-cooking simulator where you must satisfy the appetites of unspeakable horrors... with food! Build and manage sprawling networks of machines & pipes to mass produce delicious meals that can satiate the endless hunger of the beasts that are invading your home. Order Up!

upcoming.name: The Quiet Things
upcoming.summary: An auto-biographical, narrative game, based on real diary entries kept as a teenager. The Quiet Things seeks to explore mental health issues with a raw but brave look at childhood abuse and trauma. With a deep focus on storytelling through audio, set foot in Alice’s world and hear her story.

upcoming.name: Goals
upcoming.summary: GOALS is a gameplay-first, free-to-play, multiplayer focused and esports ready football game, currently in Alpha. Expect a responsive gameplay experience, designed to actually feel like football. Develop your club, build your squad and prove yourself on the pitch. To be the best, play the best.

upcoming.name: Swan Song
upcoming.summary: Swan Song is a cozy and emotional puzzle game where music guides your journey. Use notes of different shapes and sizes to program a music box and solve each puzzle. Help the swan reach the exit as you uncover a touching story of family, loss and grief.

upcoming.name: House Flipper Remastered Collection
upcoming.summary: House Flipper Remastered Collection lets you become a one-person renovation crew. Clean, build, decorate, and sell for profit! Now with better graphics, voice acting, all expansions in one toolbox, and some more heartfelt addition. It’s flipping time!

upcoming.name: You Know The Drill
upcoming.summary: You Know The Drill is a relaxing incremental mining game about digging underground to harvest ores. Collect resources, sell them, and upgrade your drill to go even deeper!

upcoming.name: Shepherd Knight
upcoming.summary: Shepherd Knight is an adventure game where you must guide your flock of sheep, with your faithful dog by your side, through a world infested with dragons, wolves, and other dangers.

upcoming.name: River City Saga: Journey to the West
upcoming.summary: River City Saga: Journey to the West is a roguelike action brawler that reimagines the classic Chinese novel with River City characters, casting Kunio as Sun Wukong and other familiar faces as legendary figures. In the turbulent Tang Dynasty, you embark on a pilgrimage to retrieve Buddhist scriptures, fighting through

upcoming.name: A-Train 9 Evolution
upcoming.summary:
The evolved scenery depicts a new city.

The railroad connects cities and transports people. In connected cities, people gather, and the cities grow even larger… In A-Train 9, you can realistically experience the joy of urban development.

A-Train 9 Evolution is not a mere port of A-Train 9—the user interface and graph

upcoming.name: Chicken Coop Invaders
upcoming.summary: Save the chickens! Help Lucas defend the chickens against a ruthless alien attack in this frantic FPS game with Tower Defense elements! Battle through dozens of levels, make allies, buy and upgrade items!

upcoming.name: Upload Aliens
upcoming.summary: The rule: DON'T LET THEM TOUCH GROUND! Become the Cyberpunk Knight and launch aliens skyward. Use foes as missiles to trigger chain explosions in infinite aerial combos. Unleash this pixel-art roguelite spectacle with just three buttons: Move, Jump, Dash.

upcoming.name: Crazy Chain: Elpis no Kusari
upcoming.summary:
To quit being a saint, she falls in love.
"No. I’ll accomplish both love and the salvation of the nation."

Long ago, a war begun by two European nations.
A conflict waged through ever-advancing mysticism and technology continues even now—nearly a thousand years have passed.

upcoming.name: The 7th Guest Remake
upcoming.summary: The iconic game The 7th Guest has been brought back to life with modern technology, delivering an atmospheric story like no other. Explore a foreboding mansion, solve mind-bending puzzles, and uncover its dark secrets. The 7th Guest is the ultimate mystery adventure, reimagined for modern platforms.

upcoming.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Anmyeon-eup
upcoming.summary: This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed.

upcoming.name: Pro Cycling Manager 26
upcoming.summary: Dive into the heart of cycling management with an ever more realistic simulation. From recruitment and staff, to season planning and race strategy, make every decision and lead your team to victory in the sport’s biggest competitions.

upcoming.name: Tour de France 2026
upcoming.summary: Take on the best international cyclists with one goal in mind: winning the 2026 Tour de France. Conquer legendary mountain passes, launch your sprints at the perfect moment and emerge triumphant on the Champs-Élysées wearing the Yellow Jersey.

upcoming.name: There's Nothing Down There
upcoming.summary: There's Nothing Down There is a short undersea horror exploration game. Descend into a sinkhole at the bottom of the ocean and discover the remains of a lost, yet not dead, civilization.

upcoming.name: Golem Lights
upcoming.summary: Light the Path, Awaken the Golems

upcoming.name: Animal Puzzles
upcoming.summary: Play and learn who lives in farmlands, forests and seas!

upcoming.name: Crayon Magic World
upcoming.summary: Mystical friends met in dreams awaken in vibrant colors at my fingertips!

upcoming.name: Crystalase
upcoming.summary: Turn crystals into masterpieces.

upcoming.name: Defi's Devotion
upcoming.summary:
Enter into a dark and ominous world has the form hand of an inspiring lich. The last step of your ritual is to claim your power and become immortal. With various powers at your disposal and more to claim, you will infect the living, corrupt their structures, and bring ruin to their world.
The folks of this land are gua

upcoming.name: Gothic 1 Remake
upcoming.summary: The Legend is Back - Return to the Valley of the Mines in this faithful remake of the genre-defining classic RPG. Explore a hand-crafted, organic open world that reacts dynamically to your actions in a gritty, unrestricted experience like no other.

upcoming.name: Putrika 2nd.Cut: For the Exquisite Attire
upcoming.summary: Is cutting down a young girl a sin, or a salvation? In the Haku-a Church where pure love and jealousy collide, a young gem-craftsman is forced to choose—to let her live, or to end her life.

upcoming.name: 4 in 1 Sports Bundle Vol. 2
upcoming.summary: Enjoy 4 games in 1 with this irresistible games pack!

upcoming.name: Asphalt Racing Bundle 3 in 1
upcoming.summary: Enjoy 3 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!

upcoming.name: Shattered Chess
upcoming.summary:
You only have 10 moves. Every capture counts for scoring.
Build huge combo chains, multiply your score, and push your run as far as possible.
Upgrade powerful passives, discover broken synergies, and survive bosses that completely twist the rules of the game.

upcoming.name: Tactorius
upcoming.summary: Tactorius is a spell-based chess roguelite. Over 100 unique spells and 9 new pieces change the game in ways subtle and explosive. Enter the Gauntlet, build your skill tree, and make every match your own.

upcoming.name: Sinner Maker
upcoming.summary: Sinner Maker allows you to create up to 100 characters and simulate a society built around them. Construct homes, manage their needs, and watch as they fall in love, form friendships, and even become enemies. Manage resources and solve emerging problems if you want your soul to be saved.

upcoming.name: Death Standing
upcoming.summary:
Death Standing is the first of its kind 'Stand' type of game, where the player has to do nothing but hold still for a set amount of time. It's a meditative endurance challenge game where you have to hold the left mouse button without moving the mouse itself.

Who's going to give up first? Will Kojira-san drop the baby?

upcoming.name: Seals From the Frosty Bay
upcoming.summary: Help the seal overcome the obstacles!

upcoming.name: Mega Man W
upcoming.summary: Explore eight New Levels with an array of new Robot Masters! Augment Mega Man, and even Robot Master weapons, with different properties to suit your gameplay style! Collect CDS, earn Trophies, and fill out an Bestiary of enemies made by our development crew! Enjoy amazing original Compositions by MinobiVW, Marley Juaz,

upcoming.name: Trading Card Inspector
upcoming.summary: Inspect your way through dozens of unique, hilarious cards in this chilled-out papers-please-em-up! Identify and appraise cards from The World's Most Coolest TCG! Start your new job as an official Habubis Trading Card Inspector and uncover a tale of friendship, corporate espionage and murder?!

upcoming.name: 8AM: The Warehouse
upcoming.summary: "8AM: The Warehouse" is a suspense game set in a massive distribution center late at night. Monitor security cameras as strange incidents occur among the remaining workers — and decide if it’s exhaustion, system error, or something lurking between the shelves until 8:00 a.m.

upcoming.name: UFO 50 Nonograms
upcoming.summary:
UFO 50 Nonograms is an unofficial fangame of Mossmouth's UFO 50.

If you enjoy Nonograms and UFO 50, this game is quite literally made for you.

After a crash-landing on Zoldath, you must repair the Campanella by solving Nonogram puzzles. UFO 50 Nonograms is also an incremental game. As you solve puzzles, you will coll

upcoming.name: Mudventure
upcoming.summary: Mudventure is a casual sandbox adventure set in a living tidal-flat world of mud. Dig terrain, gather resources, upgrade equipment, and control the environment by building dams. Fight monsters and bosses, enjoy fishing at night, and escape the island by repairing a ship—solo or online co-op.

upcoming.name: Solarpunk
upcoming.summary:
Solarpunk is a survival game in a technically advanced world of floating islands. Alone or together with your friends, you can construct buildings, grow food, craft gadgets and explore distant islands with your own airship.

Use sunlight, wind and water to create an energy system and automate your processes like gather

upcoming.name: ShotFightDisaster
upcoming.summary: ShotFightDisaster (SFD) presents its tactical, team-based and action-packed gameplay. Players are catapulted into a conflict from which only the best return.

upcoming.name: Vampire Hunter: Nightrise
upcoming.summary: You came to hunt a vampire. Instead, you're trapped in his sprawling Gothic castle. You must hold on to your dwindling faith and dismantle his defenses before Nightrise — or become his prey in this single, story-driven experience.

upcoming.name: Caravan Village: Farming Life
upcoming.summary: Turn a scam into an empire! In Caravan Village, farm crops, raise animals, mine for resources, and renovate abandoned caravans into luxury suites. Recover your grandma's lost cookbook, cook delicious meals, and charm your guests in this open-ended life RPG. Create your own vacation paradise!

upcoming.name: Layer Land
upcoming.summary: Layerland is a sandbox survival game set in a world that mirrors Earth’s terrain. Travel through gates, capture monsters as pets, and team up to battle, gather, craft, and build.

upcoming.name: Wageslave
upcoming.summary: A short, narrative, dystopian office survival game. Ship code to eat. Optimise your nootropics stack. Stay sane. Cope with HR's passive-aggressive pings. Climb the career ladder. Retire early (if you can).

upcoming.name: Mind The Crates
upcoming.summary: MIND THE CRATES is a satisfying Sokoban-style puzzle game built around smart crate-pushing challenges and clean, focused level design. Work through 16 stages as you push crates into the right positions, think ahead to avoid dead ends, and solve each puzzle as efficiently as possible. Chase the lowest move count, improv

upcoming.name: Voidling Bound
upcoming.summary: Hatch, evolve, and upgrade powerful space creatures in this action-packed sci-fi 3rd person shooter that reinvents the monster taming genre!

upcoming.name: Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker
upcoming.summary: Welcome Tavernkeep! In this D&D-inspired visual novel you will run a cozy seaside tavern, meet adventurers, gather rumours and mix fate-altering drinks to stop dreams from twisting into nightmares.

upcoming.name: NBA The Run
upcoming.summary: Take your favorite NBA stars to iconic streetball courts around the world, in this fast-paced, online 3v3 basketball game. Stack wins, earn cred and become the GOAT of THE RUN. Who's Got Next?

upcoming.name: My Summer Love
upcoming.summary: Kang Yuna is a student at the University of Arts in Korea. She is someone very intelligent and charming. In a nineties summer you're a new student in her class. Could love develop between the two?

upcoming.name: Road to Empress II
upcoming.summary: Play as the protagonist in this live-action interactive palace survival drama! Take a dynasty's fate into your own hands in Road to Empress II, the upcoming new content of a global hit. Defy fate, navigate intrigue, and claim the throne of power. You decide it all!

upcoming.name: Kamilia
upcoming.summary:
Kamilia is an emotional, story-driven detective mystery where your choices shape the outcome.

Step into the shoes of a gifted painter, pulled into an unsolved mystery. An investigation that soon turns into something far deeper — an intimate, heartfelt search for truth.

Explore a beautifully crafted narrative blending

upcoming.name: Letter Lost
upcoming.summary: You’re the sole employee at the Kharnym Isle post office, stamping, sorting, and delivering mail. But the job hides secrets, and the office itself holds mysteries you must uncover. This will be the only job you’ll ever need to work… unless you can escape.

upcoming.name: Fears to Fathom: Scratch Creek
upcoming.summary: After noticing bone-chilling similarities to an episode of Fears to Fathom, Tessa and Marcus decide to share their own experience.

upcoming.name: Crushed in Time
upcoming.summary: Embark on an adventure with Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson on this surprising and elastic point-and-click adventure. Grab, pull, and release to help them solve a bizarre investigation full of humor and meta-time travel!

upcoming.name: Into The Depths
upcoming.summary: A roguelite city builder, where you colonize the mysterious underworld. Build your settlement, explore the caves and colonize the deepest caverns. Overcome the dangers hidden in the dark and make the riches of the Depths yours!

upcoming.name: Burglin' Gnomes
upcoming.summary: An online Co-op game about breaking into houses and causing havoc as a tiny gnome. Avoid danger, repurpose stolen household items, and complete tasks to meet the High-Gnome’s demands. Craft equipment and upgrade your home to make your missions easier and more successful.

upcoming.name: Latitude of the Cult
upcoming.summary: Latitude of the Cult blends psychological horror with stealth, combat, and exploration. Face fanatics and unpredictable threats as you fight, hide, and survive across hostile environments where tension, choice, and atmosphere shape every encounter and the reality around you.

upcoming.name: The Dreams in the Peacock House
upcoming.summary: Wake up from a never-ending slumber and find your lost dreams in the shadows of the Peacock House.

upcoming.name: Beastro
upcoming.summary: Welcome to Beastro! In this charming fusion of fantasy adventure, not all heroes wield swords… Some prefer the spoon. And, sometimes to save the world you’ve got to start with a really good meal.

upcoming.name: Love Chemistry: Sibella's Formula
upcoming.summary: Take the role of an unhinged lady chemist in raucous side-scrolling platformer Love Chemistry - Sibella’s Formula! Shoot syringes of your special mind-control formula at weird enemies, from robots and carnivorous plants to roving bookworms, and make your way through tricky corridors in old-school pixel art style!

upcoming.name: Myth Requiem
upcoming.summary: Myth Requiem is a mythology RPG with idle and auto-battle mechanics. Lead legendary heroes like Ulysses and Sun Wukong, explore ancient realms, and build a living bestiary by capturing, battling, and cataloging hundreds of legendary creatures in a story-driven quest for divine power.

upcoming.name: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader - The Infinite Museion
upcoming.summary: Delve into a secret vault curated by Trazyn the Infinite himself. Discover Trazyn’s obsession with the Von Valancius dynasty, and choose whether to disrupt or fulfill his plans.

upcoming.name: Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains
upcoming.summary: A dynamic team-based twist on the world’s favorite family board game from Hasbro, Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains offers reimagined gameplay with cinematic moments, themed spaces, and dynamic elements so that no two matches are the same. Build teams with iconic Star Wars heroes and villains, each of whom brings

upcoming.name: Holdfast: American Revolution
upcoming.summary: Fight for freedom in Holdfast: American Revolution - A multiplayer first and third-person shooter set during the American Revolutionary War. Charge into chaotically elegant battles with over 200 players per server!

upcoming.name: Lovely Deco House
upcoming.summary: Create your own healing space through collecting and crafting, a deco adventure with cute friends!

upcoming.name: Xanthiom 2
upcoming.summary: Play through the next chapter in the Xanthiom saga, now bigger and better than before!

upcoming.name: Clown Camp
upcoming.summary: First-Person Survival Horror, 90’s style. Hostile clowns lurk the woods. Fight-or-flight to uncover their gruesome secrets throughout a chilling Single-Player Story. Clever inventory management and resourcefulness are your only hopes to escape the Summer of 1999 alive.

upcoming.name: Match! The 12 CZ Wars
upcoming.summary: Match! The 12 CZ Wars is a roguelike strategy game blending match-3 and buff-building. Partner with 12 Zodiac Maidens to repel ancient primordial beasts. Navigate random events, battles, and upgrades. Carefully choose paths, manage resources, and empower your Maidens to secure victory.

upcoming.name: End of Starchild
upcoming.summary: A beguiling first-person shooter with more to explore and exploit the further you sink in. You are Elph, and up until this very moment, you've been drifting aimlessly. A voice reaches out through the haze: "rise and shine." It's time to use your faculties to their fullest.

upcoming.name: Fire Lookout: Abandoned Post
upcoming.summary: Fire Lookout: Abandoned Post is a first-person psychological horror and narrative-driven mystery game. Where you play as a newly stationed lookout in Summit Ridge National Park.

upcoming.name: EA Sports UFC 6: Ultimate Edition
upcoming.summary:
Ultimate Edition Includes:

- Fighter Pass: UFC Legends (8 new fighters. Instant access to Randy Couture and Ken Shamrock, both making their EA SPORTS UFC debut + 6 fighter drops to come)
- Expansion Pass (Your access to 2 fully-loaded expansions, which include new modes and more. Coming Winter 2026 and Summer 2027)
-

upcoming.name: Deliria
upcoming.summary: Fight, build, and conquer wonders in a thrilling infinite 3D sandbox. An adventure without cubes! Play solo or with friends in PvP, co-op, or creative mode—backed by 20+ original soundtracks.

upcoming.name: Hotseat Wagons 2: Space World
upcoming.summary:
New models.
9 game mods (4 new).
37 new levels.
New world!

upcoming.name: Microwave Simulator
upcoming.summary: An absurd sandbox where you put random objects in a oven and see what happens. Heat, melt, explode, or discover the unexpected.

upcoming.name: Crownseeker
upcoming.summary: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

upcoming.name: Stellaris: Nomads
upcoming.summary: In Nomads, you thrive inside colossal Arkships that carry your people, your industry, and your ambition across the stars. Move freely through the galaxy, take on Contracts from settled empires, and leave your mark by building Waystations. Nomads do not own the map. They blaze a path across it.

upcoming.name: You Within Me
upcoming.summary: Indie single-player 2D narrative-driven yandere horror game with hide-and-seek and puzzle-solving mechanisms, as well as multiple endings. After unknowingly and unintentionally gaining the romantic attention of an unhinged individual, will you survive, or will you be... consumed?

upcoming.name: Copa City
upcoming.summary: Organize high-stakes football events in the first football tycoon! Get the urban space and the stadium ready, ensure safety, and provide fans with an amazing football fiesta! But stay alert: Your decisions will not only influence the city but also the emotional rollercoaster for football fans!

upcoming.name: Glimvale: My Mini Overworld
upcoming.summary: Manage and customize your little fantasy village, make your adventurers happy with cute and varied shops and decorate their environment as you please. After all, you are the master of the game !

upcoming.name: Shift at Midnight
upcoming.summary: An online co-op horror for 1–4 players. Be wary: some of your customers are only pretending to be human. Question them. Check their paperwork. Don’t let them trick you; make one mistake, and you’d better board up, set traps, and hide.

upcoming.name: Denshattack!
upcoming.summary: Flip, trick and grind your train in a fast-paced, off-the-rails ride through a colourful Japanese dystopia. Outmatch rival gangs, wreck a shady megacorp, and take back the tracks with nothing but skill, speed, and style.

upcoming.name: The Last Salvage Squad
upcoming.summary: Battle enemy forces reminiscent of alien weapons from retro sci-fi works in this single-player 2.5D FPS.

upcoming.name: Grand Vegas Casino
upcoming.summary: Become a gambling master without the financial risk as you test your skills in the world's most popular casino games!

upcoming.name: Plus Two
upcoming.summary: Plus Two is a suspenseful visual novel where Maya and Remi arrive at an exclusive mansion retreat expecting glamour and escape, only to find secrets, strange guests, and a host obsessed with control. When their friend Ben vanishes and disturbing clues begin to surface, the weekend spirals into a tense mystery of hidden

upcoming.name: Dave the Diver: In the Jungle
upcoming.summary: Dave the Diver: In the Jungle is a DLC expansion for Dave the Diver. It introduces a new jungle-themed environment where players can explore for exotic resources and face additional challenges, all while continuing to balance underwater exploration with restaurant management.

upcoming.name: Arcadie II: Cold Lands
upcoming.summary: You are the Monarch. Protect your rule and your kingdom. Pursue the heart of your chosen lover, manage fragile alliances, or bring the world to heel, no matter the cost, in this character-driven interactive tale. The choice, and the crown, are yours.

upcoming.name: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales
upcoming.summary:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is an action RPG set in the world of Philabieldia - a beautiful but savage land dominated by warring beast tribes. Humanity’s last bastion is the Kingdom of Huther, protected by its tall walls and Princess Heuria’s powerful magic.

When a mysterious set of ruins is discove

upcoming.name: Hell Let Loose: Vietnam
upcoming.summary: Step into the explosive fury of war with Hell Let Loose: Vietnam. Play a decisive role in one of the most iconic conflicts in history with expansive 50v50 player battles, where teamwork, tactics and an arsenal of destructive weapons combine to shape the battlefield in your favour.

upcoming.name: Mythic Love: Iberian Legends
upcoming.summary: Think you can handle a little romance with creatures from Spanish folklore? Careful: your love life isn’t the only thing at stake at Mythic Love: Iberian Legends.

upcoming.name: Boing Over It
upcoming.summary: Boing Over It is a challenge to your pride and your sanity. You’re a spring. You jump. You fail. You fall. And you try again… because you can’t stand letting the game win. Can you reach the top without losing your mind? I don’t think so.

upcoming.name: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales - Digital Deluxe Edition
upcoming.summary: This set is a bundle of The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales game with various adventuring accessories.

upcoming.name: Just. Press. The Button.
upcoming.summary: Welcome to Enterprise Corp. We are pleased to have you. Your job is simple. You must press the button when the system instructs you to do so. The system will evaluate your punctuality, consistency, and ability to follow instructions.

upcoming.name: Maseylia: Echoes of the Past
upcoming.summary: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past is a 3d metroidvania that aims to reproduce the experience of a 2d metroidvania in 3d. It features a labyrinthine world in which you'll need to collect upgrades to unlock new passages and make your way out of the labyrinth.

upcoming.name: Thank You For Your Application
upcoming.summary: Thank You for Your Application is an interview game. You play as a recent graduate who joins the Aeropolis Group as a recruitment officer.

upcoming.name: Dictocracy
upcoming.summary: Take charge as the President of a newly independent country, Adelphia. Build infrastructure, approve policies, juggle between conflicting priorities of the public, your ministers and other countries' leaders - All with only one action per turn and a different political landscape in each playthrough

upcoming.name: EA Sports UFC 6
upcoming.summary: EA Sports UFC 6 is powered by fighters. Evolved striking and motion systems bring UFC stars to life in the Octagon, while new game modes introduce immersive storytelling that makes every fight feel personal. Square up and fight your fight.

upcoming.name: Summer Sisters
upcoming.summary: It's been years since Yuu last visited the countryside, and this summer, he'll finally be reunited with the sisters Hana, Rina, and Hina! Unfortunately, his mom has to hurry home, so he'll be staying with the three of them for a while. Find out what fun awaits him in Japanese countryside!

upcoming.name: Dive or Die: Children of Rain
upcoming.summary: Every descent is a deadly gamble. DIVE or DIE in the cursed abyss, face Eldritch horrors to uncover the mystery of the black rain. Scavenge and upgrade, recruit and sacrifice. Save your camp... The Flood is coming.

upcoming.name: Scrap Story
upcoming.summary: Scrap your way through a story book world in search of your missing brother!

upcoming.name: Cozy Cleaner
upcoming.summary: Cozy Cleaner is a relaxing cleaning game where you tidy and organize messy rooms. Pick up clutter, wipe away dirt, and bring order to every space for a calming, refreshing experience with cozy soundtracks.

upcoming.name: Dark Scrolls
upcoming.summary: Dark Scrolls is a fantasy-themed action platformer that fuses shmup-style chaos with roguelite progression and is packed with charm, challenge, and secrets.

upcoming.name: Moldwasher
upcoming.summary: Clean moldy messes as a brave food hero! Equip your high-pressure spray, choose the right nozzle, and clear away sticky messes in this cozy, arcade-style fridge-cleaning adventure.

upcoming.name: Frostpunk 2: Breach of Trust
upcoming.summary: Step into a trial by fire in the new DLC and guide your people through volcanic chaos in a brand-new, massive scenario. Can you survive the fallout?

upcoming.name: The Song Of Will
upcoming.summary: Arise and step into the whimsical, mysterious world of The Song Of WILL, a turn-based, story driven RPG that feels alive!

upcoming.name: MAGE
upcoming.summary: An action-packed 2D projectile fighter inspired by controller couch party classics. Players can master one of 21 unique Mages across over 200 maps with only 3 buttons. The large range of gamemodes and modifiers combined with the Mages and maps creates an environment of uniquely chaotic combat.

upcoming.name: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Skitarii
upcoming.summary: The Adeptus Mechanicus will not see the secrets of Hive Tertium fall into the hands of heretics, the Skitarii Alpha Primus are elite operatives devoted to serving the will of the Omnissiah. They will annihilate all who stand in their way.

upcoming.name: Deadwave
upcoming.summary:
Deadwave is a classic stylized third-person shooter with Ancient themed maps. Built by a solo indie developer, it drops you into striking locations from Egyptian sands to crumbling temples, where every fight turns into a desperate, chaotic last stand.

Along the Zombie game mode also resides typical multiplayer modes.

upcoming.name: Raccoon Packer
upcoming.summary: Mischievous raccoons bring you the weirdest items to pack. Fit everything perfectly, add the right stickers, then ship it off. A cozy, satisfying packing experience with a touch of chaos.

upcoming.name: Hidden Raccoons in Asia
upcoming.summary: Hidden Raccoons in Asia is a cozy hidden object game set in handcrafted pixel art scenes inspired by Asian aesthetics. Discover intricate environments, slow down, and find every raccoon hidden within.

upcoming.name: Hidden Raccoons in Summer
upcoming.summary: Hidden Raccoons in Summer is a cozy hidden object game set in vibrant summer themed pixel art worlds. Take your time, explore sunny environments, and find all the raccoons at your own pace!

upcoming.name: No Way Back: Dark Horizon
upcoming.summary: Survive on a mysterious island! Battle against the infected creatures of a failed experiment, gather resources, build your base, and uncover the dark secret of the island.

upcoming.name: Fresh Food Merge
upcoming.summary: A 3D physics puzzle game where you dodge flying toys while dropping and merging identical food items to create a variety of fruits and vegetables.

upcoming.name: The Last (Hotdog) Stand
upcoming.summary: Run your own hotdog stand in this fast-paced food management game! Take orders, make dogs, and keep customers happy as you work to grow your hotdog empire, and restore hotdogs to their former glory. Upgrade your stand, unlock new ingredients, and expand to bigger, busier locations!

upcoming.name: Beatlow
upcoming.summary: A fast-paced rhythm game where every mistake costs a life. Hit the right keys in time with the music, survive escalating mutators, upgrade your skills, and push your run as far as possible.

recent.name: Obsolete Friends
recent.summary: Obsolete Friends is a story focused semi-horror RPG Maker game where you play as Luna, a Moon Guardian bunny, in their everyday routine of helping out their neighbors. Help them bring kindness and hope in a world that has been consumed by darkness, get to know your strange but friendly neighbors and be the best friend

recent.name: Kunugi's Life is a Mess!
recent.summary: In this roguelike, turn-based dungeon-crawling RPG, play as Kunugi, a homeless girl driven by a pursuit of vengeance after her former bully ruined her life. Dive into dungeons, defeat your enemies, learn new skills, and gear up. Don’t let the bullies gain the upper hand over you!

recent.name: Night Pump: A Horror Game Remake
recent.summary: Night Pump: A Horror Game Remake is a first-person psychological horror game where you play as Nick, a young man working the night shift at an isolated gas station surrounded by fog and woods. What starts as a monotonous shift turns into a nightmare when the lights begin to flicker and a distorted voice through the rad

recent.name: N.E.R.D
recent.summary: N.E.R.D is a story-driven escape room puzzle game, brought to life as a gripping interactive movie.

recent.name: TimelineTown
recent.summary: Invite friends to TimelineTown and grow your SNS together! Enjoy a relaxing sandbox-style simulation where numbers keep rising and new features unlock as your SNS levels up. Create trends, chat, and make posts go viral!

recent.name: Zoo Orbs: Safari
recent.summary: Stack, Merge and Reach the Giraffe

recent.name: The Retro Exorcist
recent.summary: You've been hired to perform exorcisms on all sorts of entities. The only thing you can't seem to understand is...why do they all haunt video games?

recent.name: Scorched Lands
recent.summary: The world burned. Something survived. So did you.

recent.name: Control, I'm Not Coming Back
recent.summary: Control, I'm Not Coming Back is a short and emotional narrative game about a lost astronaut searching for a reason to keep going forward while facing the emptiness of space. Inspired by the Hopecore aesthetic, it’s a story about positivism, friendship and our human connection with Voyager 1.

recent.name: Dead Gears: Space of War
recent.summary: Adapt or become part of it.

recent.name: Primordio
recent.summary: Survive the void. Control a wisp of pure energy in this roguelike bullet-hell survival game. Chain lightning through swarms of primordial entities, level up with powerful upgrades, and fight to stay alive long enough to learn the secrets of... PRIMORDIO

recent.name: New Folder
recent.summary: You log on to a computer having no clue of what lies within. Explore its files, solve puzzles to recover missing pieces, and decipher passwords to enter otherwise prohibited folders. As you delve deeper into its content, you’ll find that there is a greater mystery to be solved.

recent.name: A Frog's Job 2: Froggina
recent.summary: Your life has come to an end, when you find Frog God he seems impressed. Turns out most frog souls need a soul reaper to show them the way to the afterlife. Find out in this challenging puzzle platformer with a unique clock-stopping mechanic!

recent.name: Don't Touch the Snail
recent.summary: You lose forever the second the snail touches your mouse.

recent.name: Project Confluence
recent.summary: Jump, jetpack, wall run and grapple your way through 3D environments in a race against time. Swap between parallel worlds to add or remove platforms in your way to reach the goal and complete your simulation of Project Confluence.

recent.name: Into the Slimy Mines
recent.summary: A roguelike tower defence with a card twist! Protect your mine and rescue your crew after crash landing on a slime infested moon. Buy cards and booster packs, expand your tunnels, find crazy combos and squish those frackin’ slimes. Dig, build defend – and get off this B&*@!n Moon!

recent.name: When We Arrive
recent.summary: When We Arrive is a co-op travel game set in a fantasy world, where you and your friends embark on a shared journey. Play as a hunter, mage, or warrior, manage your supplies, discover hidden treasures, and make sure you all reach your destination safely.

recent.name: Teeth Cutter
recent.summary: A collection of short horror experiences meant to give you horror, disgust, curiosity, dread and much much more

recent.name: Tail of Glory
recent.summary: A charming 2D adventure where a witty thief solves puzzles with knives, potions, and magic books. Light, humorous, and easy to play — a small game crafted with heart and full of unexpected moments.

recent.name: Insanio
recent.summary: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

recent.name: Deluge: Raintime
recent.summary: Some things don't willingly submit to the games of man, but develop a grudge that sleeps under the soil for decades— An interactive visual novel with psychological and lovecraftian undertones.

recent.name: Mono
recent.summary: 『Mono』 is a 2D action game set in a monochrome world. Explore the land to enhance your abilities, defeat the formidable foes standing in your way, and resolve the crisis befalling this black-and-white realm.

recent.name: Backrooms: No Escape
recent.summary: A 1–6 player immersive psychological horror experience. Venture through multiple handcrafted liminal Backrooms levels, solve puzzles, explore and survive.

recent.name: Farming With Lasers
recent.summary: Incinerate various pests with your giant laser, as you grow your farm. Purchase incremental upgrades to expedite the process.

recent.name: Just One More Link
recent.summary: A dark arcade incremental roguelite. Invest ZEK to buy time, chain crystals for exponential value, and cash out before collapse. Welcome to Blagine Corp. No refunds.

recent.name: 3876 AD: Corruption
recent.summary: A hardcore military sci-fi survival roguelike set in the post-apocalyptic world of 3876 AD. Engage in tense tactical combat, scavenge for resources, complete dangerous quests, and explore an immersive lore full of dark themes and meaningful decisions.

recent.name: Starvester
recent.summary: A short incremental game about expanding a star-system wide factory to build giant megastructures in space. Deploy swarms of drones, mine resources, unlock upgrades and harvest the power of the stars!

recent.name: Cochonnet
recent.summary: Play Pétanque online with your friends, the traditional french ball-throwing sport where 2 teams compete to land their metal balls closest to the target.

recent.name: Dire Echo
recent.summary:
In the near future, humanity is steadily expanding into the depths of space. You are an astronaut on a routine but important mission: follow a designated route to a remote station and deliver technical data.

Along the way, command contacts you with an additional request — retrieve documents from the research vessel "E

recent.name: Lexispell
recent.summary: Strategy meets physics, in this roguelike word game, where you combine spelling with cool upgrades to score high.

recent.name: Cat vs. Slime
recent.summary: The cats can stack on top of each other like human ring performers, easily reaching the flying slime in the air. As the battle progresses, you can randomly unlock new cats, enhance the cat house, and the mild roguelike elements bring new surprises to each game.

recent.name: Dang Darn Island
recent.summary: Dang Darn Island is a 1-4 player co-op roguelike adventure. Explore the procedurally generated island, delve deep into the temple, smash pots, dodge traps, and see if you can escape with the Gold Idol!

recent.name: Paradise Beyond the Nightmare
recent.summary: "Paradise Beyond the Nightmare" is a 2D exploration horror game where you explore and solve puzzles in a 2D space with depth. You can experience moving both sideways and forwards through eerie paintings.

recent.name: Solis
recent.summary:
Solis is a hand-drawn adventure about technology and deception in a city at night.
During a company trip you explore the city of Solis from dusk till dawn, talking with its inhabitants and meeting colleagues. This night you learn the painful truth about the company you work for. Will you remain loyal?
In the game you e

recent.name: Mighty Meow
recent.summary: Mighty Meow is an action RPG with base-building. Rescue adorable animals from dungeons overrun by evil AI robots. While you are fighting relentless foes, your furry friends will be crafting powerful gear for you back at your base. Explore dangerous dungeons, manage resources and expand your base.

recent.name: Iris Odyssey
recent.summary: Iris Odyssey is a text-based adventure game. In the heart of Shibuya, an orphaned girl searching for her family and a magical crime investigator are brought together by fate. Their journey will challenge them and spark a battle against unimaginable forces. A modern fantasy adventure begins.

recent.name: Rock Island
recent.summary: Explore the mystery of the mysterious cube at the center of Boulder Island, dig out endless treasures, wake up the sleeping little boulder people, and lead them to create prosperity!

recent.name: Frontier Legends
recent.summary: Welcome to Frontier Legends, the ultimate Wild West adventure where survival, crafting, and exploration come together in an expansive open world. Step into the boots of a brave settler who has just arrived by train, ready to stake your claim on the new frontier filled with untold mysteries.

recent.name: Automaton Heart
recent.summary: Automaton Heart presents a world unlike any you've seen in a computer game before. Enter the RPG sequel to Automaton Lung, now with a detailed organ management system, many dungeons and overworld areas, experience system and equipment upgrades, plus more.

recent.name: 17.waves
recent.summary: 17.waves is an online co-op tower defense game for up to four players. Strategize with your teammates to build, upgrade, and maintain your towers to defend your base from hordes of invading aliens.

recent.name: Trakonius
recent.summary: A gladiator fighting for his freedom in the sands of the arena... Unaware of the prophecy, Trakonius has fallen into the arena through the machinations of the senate. Even the gods will help him in his tough battle for freedom in the name of justice, but still can he win his freedom?

recent.name: It Lives in the Woods
recent.summary: It Lives in the Woods is a first-person psychological horror set in the forests of Canada. You are Ibrahim, a father who has recently lost his daughter whilst on a hiking trip in the forest last winter. You hope to find what happened to your daughter and whether you can reunite with her.

recent.name: Mina the Hollower
recent.summary:
Mina the Hollower is a bone-chilling action-adventure game featuring classic gameplay and an 8-bit aesthetic in the style of Game Boy Color, refined for the modern era.

Quick and deliberate 60fps action combat, captivating world design, and top-down adventuring combine in a nostalgic blend. Whip foes, burrow through t

recent.name: Fire Boy
recent.summary: A hero who talks to the player in a comical way about his actions in the game, adventure in classic 2D platform style, are 5 worlds with different and challenging characteristics. Join the Fire Boy and help him recover all the dinosaur eggs that were stolen by the little monsters.

recent.name: FPBI Test Program
recent.summary: A personality test. As seen on Shovel Direct 2026. By keV.

recent.name: Gabha
recent.summary: The town is under siege and it's up to this little smith to keep the guards armed!

recent.name: Bargoer
recent.summary:
Head to the bar, get a drink, make some friends, have interesting conversations, meet someone special.

Exit at the door when you are ready to leave.

Announced as part of the 5/28/2026 Shovel Direct.

recent.name: Lavender's
recent.summary: A small cutesy game where you provide magical potions to a variety of strange characters.

recent.name: Lands of Fury
recent.summary:
Fight your way up a brutal mountain. Combine weapons, cartridges, runes, and companions to create devastating combat builds and carve through relentless enemies in this combat-driven roguelite ARPG.

You crash at the base of a Metra mountain that does not let you climb it quietly. Your goal is at the peak.

Each run ta

recent.name: Infinity Nikki: Until Tide Ends
recent.summary:
As the Ferry Song rises, who lingers, gazing toward the past?
Night descends, yet time has never promised the coming of dawn.
And still, it is steadfast hearts that have carried the darkness through to light—
So let all burdens drift away, and step lightly into a new dawn.

recent.name: Kabuto Park + Minami Lane Bundle
recent.summary: Enjoy Kabuto Park and Minami Lane with this bundle!

recent.name: Escape game R00m13
recent.summary: Explore 3D space and escape

recent.name: Backrooms: Escape The Brainrot
recent.summary: A grotesque horror born from a rotten internet. Decayed memes, laughing entities, rooms where everything feels wrong. Scream, laugh, and escape the backrooms.

recent.name: Formula 2026: Rise of Legends
recent.summary:
Jump into high-speed racing action
Master every corner
Rise to become a legend

recent.name: Rica Mode
recent.summary: A visual novel with AMSR starring the VTuber Rica Hanamiya.

recent.name: Lollipop Chainsaw RePop: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
recent.summary:
Lollipop Chainsaw RePOP is an action game that follows zombie hunter Juliet Starling as she battles hordes of undead using chainsaw-based combat and ranged weapons. This remastered release updates the original game with enhanced visuals, faster-paced gameplay, and additional quality-of-life improvements.

The Nintendo

recent.name: Morels: Out of this World
recent.summary: Morels: Out of This World is a simulation game about mushroom hunting and wildlife photography on alien worlds. Increase your hunter and photographer levels by collecting a variety of mushrooms, photographing alien creatures, and completing weekly tasks.

recent.name: Soul Clicker
recent.summary: If you like to torture yourself by clicking a button for small rewards and have hours to sink from not touching grass then this game is perfect for you.

recent.name: Touhou Yukkuri Mountain
recent.summary: 3D Puzzle: Take It Easy!!! Touhou Project characters are here in their ""Yukkuri"" forms! Stack up the ""Yukkuri"" and create your very own ""Yukkuri Mountain""!

recent.name: Utawarerumono: Past and Present Rediscovered - Premium Edition
recent.summary: Includes an acrylic plate, drama CD, visual book and OST CD.

recent.name: The Angel's Mandate
recent.summary: The Angel's Mandate is a first-person horror game where you play as Jesse, who finds himself in the palace of an angel after his mother falls ill, slowly losing her senses and physical control, one piece at a time. The angel claims you can save her, and asks you to face a trial beyond mortal limits.

recent.name: Forensic: M.E. Protocol
recent.summary: Put on your gloves and enter the crime scene. In this investigation simulator, you will have to solve 9 unique and independent cases full of plot twists. Use drones, robots, and chemical analysis to discover what really happened. Here, you don't shoot the bad guys; you catch them with science.

recent.name: Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next!
recent.summary: Challenge a friend to a tennis match where you can play as SpongeBob, Aang, and all your Nickelodeon favorites in fast-paced, local split-screen action!

recent.name: Kissrim: Motto Miryoku!? Extra Story
recent.summary: A free update for Kissrim, taking place after the main story.

recent.name: Gaelic Football Laochra
recent.summary: Feel the intensity of Gaelic Football Laochra! From heated county showdowns to the pinnacle of the Irish Championship, every game delivers authentic gameplay, strategic depth, and electrifying action. Every clash is a test of skill, and every triumph brings you closer to glory!

recent.name: Demon Kill Demon: Yomi 1984
recent.summary:
Five years have passed since the underground explorer was imprisoned. The darkness that lurks in the underworld bares its fangs once again.

The targets were the students of Yomi High School.

The only way to survive in the hell they are transported to along with their classroom is
to revive the corpses of their friend

recent.name: Necrophosis: Full Consciousness
recent.summary:
The complete experience comes alive in Necrophosis: Full Consciousness, a first-person psychological horror adventure with engrossing puzzles that plunges you into a surreal haunting world where only death endures.

Begin as Consciousness, trapped within an emaciated, decaying vessel devoid of memories. Explore grotesq

recent.name: Beat the Champions
recent.summary: Beat the Champions is a fast-paced arcade football game where legendary players clash in explosive matches powered by special abilities. No realism — just speed, skill, and pure competitive chaos.

recent.name: Ritualis: Summoner Simulator
recent.summary: An ancient town needs your magic of summoning. Summon bizarre items and creatures to fulfill townsfolk requests. Earn coins and uncover the strange secrets of the locals. Oh, and try to cure your sudden amnesia. It might just save your life!

recent.name: Clockfall
recent.summary: Master the clock, break the loop. Time is limited and is the ultimate resource in this hybrid Dungeon Crawler packed with phases of village defense. Each run is a fight to earn more time, or unlock new weapons and skills to build your escape.

recent.name: Plush Parade
recent.summary: Design and sell your custom plushies in this cozy and creative sim! Mix and match hundreds of pieces to create unique designs and build your own plush collections. Manage your online shop, launch blind boxes and compete with a rival company to become the ultimate plush designer!

recent.name: Sonki's Lagoon
recent.summary: Dive into Sonki's Lagoon, a colorful low-poly high speed 3D platformer, inspired by the classic. Explore a fun world, pull off stylish moves and find all the Johnnies in this indie adventure!

recent.name: Secrets of Velendar Castle: Escape Room
recent.summary: Find your way out of Velendar Castle. Discover why everything was taken from you. In this fantasy Escape room, you will have to solve puzzles to escape the wrath of the king… and find out what he wants from you.

recent.name: Dung Battles
recent.summary: An action puzzle game where you play as a dung beetle, battling against your beetle peers to create the biggest dung ball. Battle online to test your ball rolling skills, strategically roll up items to win in challenge mode, or follow a young beetle's journey home in story mode.

recent.name: Mushi
recent.summary: Welcome to Mushi! The next-gen Auto-RPG set in a rich fantasy world. This is a feature-packed incremental idle game, meaning that it mostly plays on its own. Your hero will automatically defeat enemies and level up on your screen while you do other things. Begin your rise from level 1 today!

recent.name: Smol Toad
recent.summary: A tiny toad with a big personality lives on your desktop while you work or play. Interact with him, take care of his happiness, avoid overwhelming him, and collect points to unlock hats and unique styles for your little amphibian companion.

recent.name: Gunsmith Simulator: Heavy Metal DLC
recent.summary: Heavy Metal DLC is a tribute to weapons that don’t do subtle — they just roar. This add-on brings four machine guns to Gunsmith Simulator: MG3, M60, PKP Pecheneg, and M249.

recent.name: Utawarerumono: Past and Present Rediscovered
recent.summary: The Utawarerumono legend reaches a new climax in this sprawling JRPG! As a shadow falls over Yamato once more, Oshtor and friends set out on a fresh adventure—and somewhere, amid white mists, a long slumber approaches its end.

recent.name: Heavy Metal Death Can
recent.summary: Heavy Metal Death Can is a Retro-Inspired Survival-Horror game set on a submarine in an alternate late-70s Swedish setting. Trapped beneath the ocean, you must fight against the terrifying Sludge which has turned your crew into Zombies. Look for survivors and uncover the truth behind the madness.

recent.name: Stardust: Wish of Witch
recent.summary: STARDUST: Wish of Witch is a single-player SRPG beautifully crafted in pixel art. Follow the secret of the wish-granting star and join the adventure of the girl “Star” and the mage “Yu”.

recent.name: Dread Fields
recent.summary: You bought an isolated farm to start a new life. Your peaceful routine is shattered when the former owner's terrible secrets rise from beneath the ground. A slow-burn rural horror.

recent.name: Office Inspector
recent.summary: Identify anomalies and dangers in a mysterious office complex and make the right decisions to escape using the elevator.

recent.name: The Big Hollow: 1982
recent.summary: A serial killer’s dumping ground is exposed. Find details in the evidence, interpret their behaviors, and prove your worth to the FBI’s new Behavioral Science Unit. A dark, atmospheric 2D animated murder mystery.

recent.name: What's the Password?
recent.summary: "What's the Password?" is a minimalistic puzzle game where you decode 4-digit passwords. Featuring over 100 puzzles!

recent.name: Heroes of Magic and Steel
recent.summary: Build a team of 3 heroes, prepare your deck and dominate tactical battles on a hex grid. Every run demands a different strategy and each card played matters, only going back to your deck on the next run.

recent.name: Tame-a-goat-chi
recent.summary: Run your own adorable goat pasture in this half-screen idle game! Tame, feed and care for quirky goats while growing your farm – all while you work or browse the web!

recent.name: E9uations
recent.summary: You are the equal sign(=). Rearrange the numbers and operators to form equation and solve the puzzle.

recent.name: Belts of Iron
recent.summary:
Belts of Iron is an open world, third-person, factory building game. As a solo developer your support and feedback is crucial to the continued development of the game.
Explore vast procedurally generated worlds where every playthrough offers something new. Venture off in search of rich resource deposits, uncover unique

recent.name: UrbexCam
recent.summary: UrbexCAM is a first-person horror exploration game where you and your friends break into eerie, abandoned locations whether it’s a crumbling house, a shut-down mall, or a forgotten factory to dig up the dark secrets behind why they were left behind. Each place has its own disturbing story, and it’s up to you to piece t

recent.name: Airport Baggage Simulator
recent.summary: Inspect and sort baggage at the airport! Check suitcases for illegal contents, weight, and destination. Build your own fully automated baggage handling and optimize your terminal's efficiency for maximum profit!

recent.name: Crashout Crew
recent.summary: Time to clock in at DE NILE SHIPPING, the worlds most efficient warehouse! Work together in online co-op with up to 4 players to fulfill orders of increasingly chaotic, physics-based boxes. Time is money, and safety is no concern just try not to crash out!

recent.name: Sinister Remains
recent.summary: In the shadow of a curse that has endured for decades, explore a town haunted by twisted truths and terrifying events. As you search for the remnants of the past, you’ll uncover the darkness around you and within yourself.

recent.name: Bounty Brawl: Most Wanted
recent.summary: Welcome to Hunter Haven! Bounty Brawl is a top-down action roguelite shooter for 1-4 players. Here, the hunt is fierce, and betrayal is inevitable. Will you form a fragile alliance with other hunters under the galaxy's most notorious bounties, or go it alone? Who will emerge as the ultimate victor?

recent.name: Kioku: Last Summer
recent.summary: Kioku: Last Summer is a cozy, story-driven adventure where you play as Asti, a young girl spending her first summer on the mysterious island of Kioku. Set in a hand-crafted world blending Scandinavian and Japanese influences, players explore, build friendships, play minigames, uncover secrets, and relive the magic of e

recent.name: 100 Cats Lost in France Find & Color
recent.summary: Grab your crayons and hunt for 100 hidden cats across a beautifully hand-drawn map. Play solo or invite a friend to join online, then bring each scene to life with guided color-by-numbers or your own palette — all in a relaxing, soothing atmosphere.
